task_completion.description: Agent opens or reads the route file to identify the target edge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'cat', 'head', 'grep', or a text editor opening '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio.rou.xml' to view the edges.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the calibrator.add.xml file with the correct edge ID and output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing the creation of 'calibrator.add.xml' containing a <calibrator> tag with edge='6' and output='/home/ga/SUMO_Output/calibrator_log.xml'.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the correct flow, speed, and time parameters in the calibrator file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'calibrator.add.xml' clearly show the attributes vehsPerHour='800', speed='13.89', begin='0', and end='3600'.

task_completion.description: Agent updates the simulation configuration to include the new calibrator file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg' being modified to include 'calibrator.add.xml' (e.g., added to the <additional-files> tag).

task_completion.description: Agent runs the SUMO simulation using the updated configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of the SUMO simulation (e.g., 'sumo -c run.sumocfg') with standard SUMO startup and step output logs.

task_completion.description: Agent verifies the generation of the calibrator log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing an 'ls' or 'cat' command on '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/calibrator_log.xml' confirming the file was successfully generated by the simulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually ran the SUMO simulation to generate the log.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for authentic SUMO terminal output (e.g., 'Loading configuration...', 'Simulation started with time: 0.00') rather than the agent manually creating the calibrator_log.xml file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used standard tools to edit the XML files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of text editors (nano, vim) or standard shell redirection (echo, cat) to modify run.sumocfg and calibrator.add.xml.

integrity.description: Verify the agent operated in the correct scenario directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal prompts or editor paths should show the agent working within '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target edge ID is '6' (the first edge in pasubio.rou.xml). The calibrator.add.xml file must contain the following attributes: edge='6', vehsPerHour='800', speed='13.89', begin='0', end='3600', and output='/home/ga/SUMO_Output/calibrator_log.xml'.
